articles.title: King Charles III highlights US-UK bond during busy day of diplomacy with Trump and Congress - AP News
articles.description: King Charles III has marked the 250th anniversary of American independence from Britain with gratitude that the two countries united to build “one of the most consequential alliances in human history.” Still, he is urging “that we ignore the clarion calls to …
